basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Environment Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC) Consultant-A Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website moef.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MoEFCC Consultant-A Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in science or Bachelor's degree in engineering/technology, Experience of more than 3 years and up to 5 years in relevant field, Retired Government Employees with Grade Pay of Rs. 4600/- and above
qualification.details: Master's degree in science or Bachelor's degree in engineering/technology with good knowledge of MS Office and experience in relevant field for more than 3 years and up to 5 years. Retired Government Employees with Grade Pay of Rs. 4600/- and above with knowledge of MS Office and experience in relevant field for more than 3 years and up to 5 years.

selection_process: Application Scrutiny and Shortlisting Interview Recommendation by Consultancy Evaluation Committee (CEC)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MoEFCC Consultant-A Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download MoEFCC Consultant-A Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.ministry_of_environment_forest_and_clima: Master's degree in science or Bachelor's degree in engineering/technology, Experience of more than 3 years and up to 5 years in relevant field, Retired Government Employees with Grade Pay of Rs. 4600/- and above

content_sections.heading: MoEFCC Consultant-A Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MoEFCC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MoEFCC Consultant-A Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MoEFCC Consultant-A Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Master's degree in science or Bachelor's degree in engineering/technology with good knowledge of MS Office and experience in relevant field for more than 3 years and up to 5 years. Retired Government Employees with Grade Pay of Rs. 4600/- and above with knowledge of MS Office and experience in relevant field for more than 3 years and up to 5 years.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: MoEFCC Consultant-A Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Application Scrutiny and Shortlisting Interview Recommendation by Consultancy Evaluation Committee (CEC)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MoEFCC Consultant-A Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MoEFCC Consultant-A recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MoEFCC Consultant-A positions is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Consultant-A post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Consultant-A post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Consultant-A role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in science or a Bachelor's degree in engineering/technology. Experience in a relevant field for 3 to 5 years is also required, or retired government employees with specific grade pay can also apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the MoEFCC Consultant-A positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the MoEFCC Consultant-A recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Consultant-A posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application scrutiny and shortlisting, followed by an interview, and finally, a recommendation by the Consultancy Evaluation Committee (CEC).

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant-A post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant-A post released by the Ministry of Environment Forest and Climate Change.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Consultant-A post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Jaipur, Rajasthan.
